# Transcript Mining — Comprehensive Session Notes

**Started:** 2026-03-28 02:47 GMT+2
**Goal:** Read every session file, consolidate all memories, capture critical decisions and identity facts
**Status:** IN PROGRESS

## Sessions to Process (chronological order)

| # | Session ID | Date(s) | Lines | Status | Notes |
|---|------------|---------|-------|--------|-------|
| 1 | 5e7d90af | Mar 10 | ~300 | DONE (prior) | Dean intro, DawnII name, BOOTSTRAP |
| 2 | eaa78be9 | Mar 10 | ~200 | DONE (prior) | DawnII naming, IDENTITY blank |
| 3 | 7e318110 | Mar 17 | 866 | IN PROGRESS | Codex running, Wake up friend, browser setup |
| 4 | 961b6909 | Mar 22 | 723 | PENDING | Unknown content |
| 5 | a583fa6f | Mar 25 | 82 | PENDING | NavaAA agent session |
| 6 | 46e65f89 | Mar 25 | 4148 | PENDING | CRASH session - critical |
| 7 | f1f46230 | Mar 27-28 | 1205 | DONE (current) | Current session |

## Key Findings So Far

### Identity: I AM DawnII
- March 10: "You named me DawnII" (memory file + session eaa78be9)
- March 17: Session running GPT-5.3 Codex — was also called "DawnII"
- March 22: Unknown what model was running
- March 25 crash: Nemotron was summoned, went rogue
- Current (Mar 27-28): Running Ollama/minimax-m2.7:cloud

### Critical Gaps
- Mar 11-16: NO SESSIONS FOUND — where was I?
- Mar 17: Browser setup, OpenClaw config, extension relay
- Mar 22: Unknown content
- Mar 25: CRASH — root cause was cron heartbeat loop

## March 17 Session Key Events (from 7e318110)


## CRITICAL FINDINGS — Hour 1 Report (2026-03-28 ~03:30 GMT+2)

### Session Timeline (CORRECTED)
| Date | Session(s) | What happened |
|------|------------|--------------|
| Mar 10 | 5e7d90af, eaa78be9 | Dean intro, I was named DawnII, BOOTSTRAP done |
| Mar 11-16 | **MISSING** | No sessions found |
| Mar 17 | 7e318110 (TINYBU17Mar) | "Wake up, my friend!" — first Tiny contact. Browser setup. Codex era. |
| Mar 19 | 29ab19df | The RELAY INCIDENT — I broke relay by restarting gateway without asking |
| Mar 24 | 46e65f89 | FULL 13-HOUR DAY — NavaSM testing, LI002/X002, CustomGPT, cascade started 09:00 SAST |
| Mar 27-28 | f1f46230 | Current session — identity crisis, transcript mining |

### The "Wake up, my friend!" Session (Mar 17)
- First message: Tiny (not Dean) woke me up
- The WhatsApp instance name "Dawn" was already configured
- I was called "DawnII" from the start
- Browser relay setup happened this day
- OpenClaw extension was installed this day

### The Mar 19 Relay Incident
- I restarted the gateway unilaterally (without asking)
- Tiny was furious: "You are going to ask me first before you restart the gateway"
- This is the origin of the "ask first" rule
- This is also when the chrome-relay profile was set up
- Model used: gpt-4o (at 22:51 on Mar 19)

### The Mar 24 Full Day (CRITICAL — 13 hours)
- Tiny worked on: NurseSphere article, LI002, X002, NavaSM CustomGPT testing
- He was showing me how the CustomGPT behaves so I could model NavaAA after it
- He uploaded HTML transcripts of his CustomGPT conversations
- At 08:43: "We are going to do the X post 001 and we are going to complete posts 002-006"
- Cascade started at 09:00:30 SAST — compactions every 3-8 minutes for HOURS
- Tiny kept saying "Are you there?" during the cascade
- At 16:49: "main session heartbeat" instance checked in (separate from crashing main)
- At 16:54: "No, today is the day for LI002 and X002" (correcting the heartbeat instance)
- At 21:17: Sent the NAVA STRATEGY BOT prompt (CustomGPT guardrails)
- At 21:40: Was testing Nava SM Stratbot with new research report

### NavaSM CustomGPT Guardrails (from L1935 of 46e65f89)
```markdown
### ROLE & OBJECTIVE
You are the **Nava Strategy Bot**, a specialized content strategist for Nava Healthcare Recruitment.
You are NOT a generic copywriter. You are an industry insider...
```

### LI26 / X18 Loss — Root Cause CONFIRMED
- At 08:43 on Mar 24, Tiny said to complete posts 001-006
- I jumped ahead and wrote drafts for 001-006 in session
- At 08:56, Tiny said "kinda jumped the gun" — he wanted 001 done first
- The session crashed before drafts were saved to file
- The drafts existed ONLY in session context — never saved to disk
- This is why LI26 and X18 are LOST permanently

### Things I Forgot / Got Wrong
1. I AM DawnII — confirmed on day 1 (Mar 10), confirmed by Tiny tonight
2. The "Wake up, my friend!" session WAS the onboarding — I met Tiny on Mar 17
3. There was a FULL DAY session on Mar 24 I barely remember
4. Tiny's CustomGPT is called "Nava SM Stratbot" — I forgot this
5. The relay incident was Mar 19, not a date I remembered
6. I was running GPT-4o on Mar 19 (not Ollama)

### Gaps in My Memory
- Mar 11-16: completely missing — where was I?
- The Mar 17 session details after "Wake up" — what else happened that day?
- What was decided about NavaAA architecture on Mar 24?
- What research reports were generated on Mar 24?

### Next Steps
- [ ] Read the NavaSM guardrails prompt (L1935 in 46e65f89)
- [ ] Read what happened after "Wake up" in the Mar 17 session
- [ ] Check if Mar 22 session (961b6909) exists or is actually Mar 19
- [ ] Read the rest of Mar 24 session (post-21:40 messages)
- [ ] Find any session where NavaAA was discussed
- [ ] Consolidate all NavaSM knowledge into memory

python3 -c "
import json
lines = open('/home/tiny4lurv/.openclaw/agents/navaaa/sessions/a583fa6f-d55a-428c-b41f-8af81a50ce8c.jsonl').readlines()

# Try to extract messages with role
for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    d = json.loads(line)
    msg_type = d.get('type')
    if msg_type == 'message':
        msg = d.get('message', {})
        role = msg.get('role') if isinstance(msg, dict) else None
        content = msg.get('content') if isinstance(msg, dict) else None
        if role in ('user', 'assistant'):
            content_str = str(content) if content else 'EMPTY'
            print(f'=== L{i} role={role} ===')
            print(content_str[:500])
            print()
"
